name: codas-impact
title: codas impact: CLI reverse-reachability query over call-graph facts (P7 CLI-first query)
description: First P7 agent-query deliverable, CLI-first (NOT MCP). codas impact <symbol|path> walks the existing calls facts (reverse reachability) to answer 'changing this affects whom', emitting deterministic JSON. Plus query/select subcommands so jq is optional. MCP stays an optional thin stateless shell over the same core (role-integration; shells out, never reimplements fact logic), only if a runtime needs typed tools.
creator: oydodo
